posts.raw_content:
Coroners are either the first people corrupted by the cabal, or the most easily bribed people on the planet.

Been browsing this site since it was hosted on reddit.   Been watching politics for a lot longer.

The number of people who commit "suicide" in bizarre ways is starting to get a bit obvious.  Especially now that there's a growing list of people who have killed themselves after explicitly stating that they are in good health mentally and have no intention  of self harm.

People rightfully claim that the global satanic pedophile cabal infiltrated the judicial system first, but I'm pretty sure it was not the courts they initially targeted, but the morgues.
